comment: Curated list of packages with no version that supports modern .NET (cross-platform). Used by MIG2001 in the offline path. Matched by exact package id, case-insensitively. The --online path (Phase 6) supplements this with live nuget.org lookups.

packages.reason: ASP.NET MVC 5 runs only on .NET Framework.
ASP.NET Web API 2 runs only on .NET Framework.
ASP.NET Web API 2 runs only on .NET Framework.
System.Web-hosted Web API runs only on .NET Framework.
ASP.NET Web Pages runs only on .NET Framework.
The System.Web-era Razor engine runs only on .NET Framework.
System.Web bundling/minification runs only on .NET Framework.
packages.replacement: A build-time bundler or ASP.NET Core static asset pipeline

packages.reason: A System.Web infrastructure shim with no modern .NET target.
A System.Web bundling dependency with no modern .NET target.
OWIN hosting on System.Web runs only on .NET Framework.
Microsoft Enterprise Library is unsupported and Framework-only.
The legacy Unity container package is Framework-only.
Classic ELMAH depends on System.Web and is Framework-only.
The WinForms ReportViewer control is Windows/Framework-only.
